name: Coffee Chocolate-Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Toast almonds on a baking sheet in the oven until golden brown about 10 minutes; let cool.
2. Dissolve coffee granules in 2 tablespoons hot water.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Using a mixer set to medium speed, beat butter and sugar until fluffy. Add cooled coffee mixture, vanilla extract, and eggs, mixing until combined.
4. Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually add the dry ingredient mixture. With a wooden spoon, stir in almonds and chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets about 3 inches apart. Bake until edges begin to brown, about 10 minutes.
Notes: Remove cookies from the oven after about 3 minutes of baking before transferring them to wire racks. Per Cookie: 95 calories, 5g fat
